Sql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('2020-01-02'), ('nope')) AS t(s) WHERE REGEXP_MATCHES(s, '^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$')
SELECT LENGTH(CAST(s AS VARCHAR)) AS n FROM (VALUES ('a	b')) AS t(s)

Kql: datatable(i:int)[ 3, int(null), 1, 2 ] | sort by i asc nulls first
Sql: SELECT * FROM (VALUES (3), (CAST(NULL AS INTEGER)), (1), (2)) AS t(i) ORDER BY i ASC NULLS FIRST
SELECT COALESCE(TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT), '') AS n, (COALESCE(TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT), '') IS NULL OR CAST(COALESCE(TRY_CAST(NULL AS TEXT), '') AS VARCHAR) = '') AS e
SELECT COALESCE(CASE WHEN TRUE THEN 'True' WHEN NOT TRUE THEN 'False' END, '') AS b, COALESCE(CASE WHEN FALSE THEN 'True' WHEN NOT FALSE THEN 'False' END, '') AS f

Kql: print a = gettype(parse_json("123")), b = gettype(parse_json('"hi"')), c = gettype(parse_json("1.5"))
Sql: SELECT CASE WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) IN ('TINYINT','SMALLINT','INTEGER','BIGINT','HUGEINT','UTINYINT','USMALLINT','UINTEGER','UBIGINT','UHUGEINT') THEN 'long' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) LIKE 'DECIMAL%' THEN 'decimal' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) IN ('FLOAT','DOUBLE','REAL') THEN 'real' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) = 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) = 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) IN ('TIMESTAMP','DATE','TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE','TIMESTAMP_NS','TIMESTAMP_MS','TIMESTAMP_S') THEN 'datetime' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) LIKE 'INTERVAL%' THEN 'timespan' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) = 'UUID' THEN 'guid' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) LIKE '%[]' OR TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) LIKE 'STRUCT%' OR TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) LIKE 'MAP%' THEN 'array' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON)) = 'JSON' THEN (CASE json_type(CAST(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON) AS VARCHAR)) WHEN 'ARRAY' THEN 'array' WHEN 'OBJECT' THEN 'dictionary' WHEN 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN 'BIGINT' THEN 'long' WHEN 'UBIGINT' THEN 'long' WHEN 'DOUBLE' THEN 'real' WHEN 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN 'NULL' THEN 'null' ELSE 'dictionary' END) ELSE LOWER(TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('123' AS JSON))) END AS a, CASE WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) IN ('TINYINT','SMALLINT','INTEGER','BIGINT','HUGEINT','UTINYINT','USMALLINT','UINTEGER','UBIGINT','UHUGEINT') THEN 'long' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) LIKE 'DECIMAL%' THEN 'decimal' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) IN ('FLOAT','DOUBLE','REAL') THEN 'real' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) = 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) = 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) IN ('TIMESTAMP','DATE','TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE','TIMESTAMP_NS','TIMESTAMP_MS','TIMESTAMP_S') THEN 'datetime' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) LIKE 'INTERVAL%' THEN 'timespan' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) = 'UUID' THEN 'guid' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) LIKE '%[]' OR TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) LIKE 'STRUCT%' OR TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) LIKE 'MAP%' THEN 'array' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON)) = 'JSON' THEN (CASE json_type(CAST(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON) AS VARCHAR)) WHEN 'ARRAY' THEN 'array' WHEN 'OBJECT' THEN 'dictionary' WHEN 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN 'BIGINT' THEN 'long' WHEN 'UBIGINT' THEN 'long' WHEN 'DOUBLE' THEN 'real' WHEN 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN 'NULL' THEN 'null' ELSE 'dictionary' END) ELSE LOWER(TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('"hi"' AS JSON))) END AS b, CASE WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) IN ('TINYINT','SMALLINT','INTEGER','BIGINT','HUGEINT','UTINYINT','USMALLINT','UINTEGER','UBIGINT','UHUGEINT') THEN 'long' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) LIKE 'DECIMAL%' THEN 'decimal' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) IN ('FLOAT','DOUBLE','REAL') THEN 'real' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) = 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) = 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) IN ('TIMESTAMP','DATE','TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE','TIMESTAMP_NS','TIMESTAMP_MS','TIMESTAMP_S') THEN 'datetime' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) LIKE 'INTERVAL%' THEN 'timespan' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) = 'UUID' THEN 'guid' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) LIKE '%[]' OR TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) LIKE 'STRUCT%' OR TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) LIKE 'MAP%' THEN 'array' WHEN TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON)) = 'JSON' THEN (CASE json_type(CAST(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON) AS VARCHAR)) WHEN 'ARRAY' THEN 'array' WHEN 'OBJECT' THEN 'dictionary' WHEN 'VARCHAR' THEN 'string' WHEN 'BIGINT' THEN 'long' WHEN 'UBIGINT' THEN 'long' WHEN 'DOUBLE' THEN 'real' WHEN 'BOOLEAN' THEN 'bool' WHEN 'NULL' THEN 'null' ELSE 'dictionary' END) ELSE LOWER(TYPEOF(TRY_CAST('1.5' AS JSON))) END AS c

Kql: let a=datatable(k:long,v:long)[1,10,2,20]; let b=a|summarize count() by k; let c=b|extend count_=count_*2; c | project k, count_ | sort by k asc
Sql: WITH a AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT))) AS t(k, v)), b AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT k, COUNT(*) AS count_ FROM a GROUP BY ALL), c AS NOT MATERIALIZED (SELECT * EXCLUDE (count_), count_ * 2 AS count_ FROM b) SELECT k, count_ FROM c ORDER BY k ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(t:long,v:long)[1,10,2,20,3,30] | sort by t asc | serialize p = prev(v, 1, -1)
Sql: SELECT *, LAG(v, 1, (-1)) OVER (ORDER BY t ASC NULLS FIRST) AS p FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT), CAST(10 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT), CAST(20 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT), CAST(30 AS BIGINT))) AS t(t, v) ORDER BY t ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(t:long)[1,2,3] | sort by t asc | serialize rn = row_number(5)
Sql: SELECT *, (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t ASC NULLS FIRST) + (5 - 1)) AS rn FROM (VALUES (CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(2 AS BIGINT)), (CAST(3 AS BIGINT))) AS t(t) ORDER BY t ASC NULLS FIRST

Kql: datatable(g:string,v:long)[ "a",5, "a",3, "b",8, "b",1, "b",2 ] | sort by g asc, v desc | serialize cs = row_cumsum(v, g != prev(g))
Sql: SELECT * EXCLUDE (_rb0, _rg0), SUM(v) OVER (PARTITION BY _rg0 ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS cs FROM (SELECT *, SUM(CASE WHEN _rb0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS _rg0 FROM (SELECT *, (g IS DISTINCT FROM LAG(g) OVER (ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST, v DESC NULLS LAST)) AS _rb0 FROM (SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('a', CAST(5 AS BIGINT)), ('a', CAST(3 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(8 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(1 AS BIGINT)), ('b', CAST(2 AS BIGINT))) AS t(g, v) ORDER BY g ASC NULLS FIRST, v DESC NULLS LAST)))
Detail: rows match as a set but order differs
